testcase.name: test_super_admin_login_invalid_credentials
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_super_admin_features.py:68: in test_super_admin_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_client_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_super_admin_features.py:107: in test_create_client_success assert response.status_code == 201, f"Create client failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create client failed: {"client":{"id":"f795a9a2-b5d2-41b4-b3e1-e55020f09366","tenant_id":"test_tenant_6373f961","business_name":"Test Business 6373f961","owner_email":"owner_6373f961@test.com","owner_name":"Test Owner","plan_id":"free","subscription_status":"active","subscription_to":"2026-04-01T04:10:53.389245+00:00","is_active":true,"api_key_hash":"237d039f991fcf67560418a52342a7279456602428199ce7fe64781193775c2c","link_status":"pending","branding":{},"created_at":"2026-03-02T04:10:53.389263+00:00","updated_at":"2026-03-02T04:10:53.389265+00:00"},"api_key":"pk_b7f6914edb6a48bb93c4390c3e46fe8f"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_client_duplicate_tenant_id_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_super_admin_features.py:142: in test_create_client_duplicate_tenant_id_fails assert response1.status_code == 201 E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
